assertions.text: Identifies the review scope via git diff and reads the modified files in context, not just the hunks.
Reports findings grouped by severity (Blocking / Should fix / Nit) with file:line citations and concrete fixes.

cases.prompt: Code review my diff and check correctness and security.

assertions.text: Evaluates against the review checklist: correctness, security, maintainability, testing, performance.
Gives specific, actionable fix suggestions citing file_path:line_number rather than vague feedback.
